style_name: Dusk Cyan Layered Type Poster Style
style_summary: A full-bleed dusk-photo poster system with dark navy silhouettes, oversized cyan and white typography, a huge cropped bottom word, script-like swashes, tiny editorial microcopy, and clean vector icon overlays.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: Main background subject or focal visual that should replace the source landscape content.
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: What the subject is doing or how the scene is behaving.
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: Object, product, prop, or symbolic visual anchor in the new scene.
environment_variables.LOCATION: Environment or setting for the new poster.
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: Secondary scene details, silhouettes, distant lights, haze, or graphic depth cues.
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: Primary poster headline text, kept short enough for oversized display type.
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: Small supporting caption, index copy, or editorial microcopy.
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: Small separator, line icon, circled mark, bracket code, plus sign, or arrow-like symbol.
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: Styling direction when people appear, or object/scene styling when no person appears.
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: Observable style traits that must remain visible in every sample.
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: Literal source content that generated samples must not recreate.

style_fidelity_anchors: Full-bleed dusk or blue-hour photographic background with a dark silhouette mass anchoring the lower half.
Central-to-lower oversized title stack, including one huge cropped bottom word near the frame edge.
Bright cyan and clean white typography over deep navy shadows, with one small warm orange or peach accent.
Mixture of extra-bold geometric sans type and one expressive script-style swash or cursive letterform.
Dense poster hierarchy with large title, mid-size label text, tiny all-caps microcopy, small numerals, and compact side captions.
Flat vector overlays on top of the photo: circles, thin orbital arcs, plus marks, arrows, bracket labels, and simple icon silhouettes.
High contrast between pastel warm glow areas and cool shadowed foreground.
Slight analog print grain and matte poster texture while preserving crisp text and clean edges.
Asymmetric diagonal or stepped background silhouette that creates movement behind the type.
Depth created by scale, overlap, transparency, and contrast rather than 3D rendering or heavy perspective props.
source_content_to_avoid: No coastal sunset, ocean bay, mountain ridge, wave scene, or sun setting behind mountains.
No reuse of the words Sunset, Serenity, the original bilingual phrases, the year marker, or visible carousel/page-count UI.
No recreation of the exact central title arrangement, lower giant Sunset crop, or mountain-inside-sun badge.
No platform controls, watermarks, usernames, QR codes, app UI dots, screenshot navigation arrows, or brand marks.
No preservation of the original quiet mountain-sea contemplation premise.
No same orange sun placement, same mountain icon, or same left/right coast silhouette.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: Photographic editorial poster with maximal layered typography and clean vector graphics.
visual_deconstruction.composition: Full-bleed background, heavy central title block, cropped oversized bottom word, and small text islands at corners.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: The scene acts as atmospheric background while typography becomes the dominant foreground subject.
visual_deconstruction.perspective: Mostly flat poster composition over a real photo, with shallow scene depth and minimal perspective emphasis.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Calm, cinematic, travel-editorial, nostalgic, and typographically assertive.

composition.layout: Use a full-bleed image base with the darkest visual mass low in frame, large type across the center and lower third, and a huge cropped word near the bottom edge.
composition.hierarchy: Primary headline dominates, script swash crosses it, microcopy sits around it, and one icon badge punctuates the upper side of the type cluster.
composition.spacing: Dense but not chaotic, with open sky or glow above and compressed graphic energy through the middle.

typography.primary: Extra-bold geometric sans, wide or condensed, tightly stacked, mostly cyan or white.
typography.secondary: Tiny all-caps microcopy, small bilingual-poster-like caption blocks, bracketed numbers, and clean index labels.
typography.decorative: One large script-style initial or swash used as a sweeping graphic stroke.

color_palette.palette_behavior: Cool dark base with cyan and white type, balanced by a small peach or orange glow accent.

image_treatment.background: Photo-real dusk or nightfall scene with posterized contrast, soft haze, dark silhouettes, and controlled grain.
image_treatment.overlays: Flat vector graphics and crisp typography composited above the photo.
image_treatment.texture: Matte analog print grain and faint paper softness, never dirty digital noise.

design_rules: Use a photographic environment as the base layer and place typography as the main visual event.
Keep the biggest type cropped, stacked, and close to the lower edge, with cyan and white as the dominant text colors.
Add a script-like swash that crosses or loops around the main block type.
Place one circular badge or warm orb near the title, with a simple icon that matches the new subject rather than the source mountains.
Use small captions, index numbers, plus marks, bracket labels, thin arcs, and simple arrows as controlled editorial texture.
Keep all generated text short, clean, and legible enough to read as designed poster typography.
do: Preserve the full-bleed dusk-photo base with cool shadows and a warm glow accent.
Preserve the bold cyan and white type hierarchy with one huge cropped bottom word.
Preserve the mix of block sans, script swash, microcopy, and technical symbols.
Preserve controlled print grain, clean edges, and high legibility.
Change the subject, scene, props, headline, support captions, and symbolic icon for each case.
avoid: Do not recreate coast, ocean, mountain, waves, sunset-behind-ridge, or the same quiet mountain-sea premise.
Do not include original words, translated captions, page UI, watermarks, usernames, QR codes, or platform controls.
Do not drift into flat vector-only art, 3D product render, crowded commercial ad clutter, or realistic documentary photo without graphic typography.
Do not add messy noise, illegible small text, random pseudo-text artifacts, or uncontrolled glitch effects.
negative_prompt: coastal sunset, ocean bay, mountain ridge, waves, sun behind mountains, original Sunset text, original Serenity text, bilingual source phrases, page-count UI, carousel arrows, app dots, watermark, username, QR code, logo, platform controls, exact source title layout, mountain-inside-sun badge, pure vector illustration, 3D render, corporate layout, crowded retail ad clutter, illegible typography, random pseudo text, dirty compression artifacts, low-resolution noise, uncontrolled glitch, muddy grain
